changeSet.author: mcpierce
changeSet.createView: SELECT ct.tag_value AS story_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comic_details_v4 cd WHERE ct.comic_detail_id = cd.comic_detail_id) AS comic_count FROM comic_tags_v4 ct WHERE ct.tag_type = 'STORY' UNION SELECT s.story_name AS story_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scraped_story_entries_v4 se WHERE se.scraped_story_id = s.scraped_story_id) AS comic_count FROM scraped_stories_v4 s;
